user.title: Solar Mind Setup
user.description: Configure Solar Mind to optimize your solar PV and battery system.

data_description.name: A name for this Solar Mind instance
data_description.solax_device_type: Select how your Solax inverter is controlled

pv_system.title: PV System Configuration
pv_system.description: Configure your solar PV panel parameters for generation forecasting.

data_description.pv_azimuth: Azimuth angle of your solar panels (-180 to 180, 0=North, 180=South)
data_description.pv_tilt: Tilt angle of your solar panels (0=horizontal, 90=vertical)
data_description.max_pv_power: Maximum peak power output of your PV system in Watts

price.title: Price Sensor Configuration
price.description: Select the spot price sensor for electricity prices.

data_description.price_sensor: Sensor that provides hourly spot prices
data_description.price_source: Select the integration providing prices (affects how data is parsed)

weather.title: Weather Configuration
weather.description: Optionally select a weather entity for solar production forecasting.

data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity for solar production forecasting

strategy.title: Strategy Configuration
strategy.description: Configure how Solar Mind selects its optimization strategy.

data_description.strategy_selector_entity: An input_select or select entity to choose the active strategy. Leave empty to always use the fallback strategy.
data_description.fallback_strategy: Strategy to use when the selector entity is not set or unavailable

init.title: Solar Mind Options
init.description: Configure thresholds and behavior for Solar Mind.

data_description.charge_price_threshold: Charge from grid when price is below this value
data_description.discharge_price_threshold: Discharge to grid when price is above this value
data_description.min_soc: Minimum battery state of charge to maintain
data_description.max_soc: Maximum battery state of charge when charging
data_description.max_charge_power: Maximum power when charging from grid
data_description.max_discharge_power: Maximum power when discharging to grid
data_description.discharge_allowed: Enable selling electricity back to the grid (check local regulations)
data_description.update_interval: How often to update and run strategy

charge_battery_from_grid.name: Charge Battery from Grid
charge_battery_from_grid.description: Force charge the battery from the grid.

discharge_battery_to_grid.name: Discharge Battery to Grid
discharge_battery_to_grid.description: Discharge the battery to the grid (sell electricity).

set_self_use.name: Set Self Use Mode
set_self_use.description: Set the inverter to self-use mode.

set_battery_for_house.name: Set Battery for House
set_battery_for_house.description: Use the battery to power the house.

set_house_use_grid.name: Set House Use Grid
set_house_use_grid.description: Set the house to use grid power.
